name: Budget Change Request Engine
description:
Multi-function approval engine for Budget Change Requests. Pass a function name and JSON payload. Returns a JSON string.

Functions (3):
• getChangeRequestChain — Determines approval chain based on requestor's role (CEO > EM > PM > Responsible > Owner). No amount thresholds. Input: requestor_id, requestor_roles, owner_id, responsible_id, responsible_name, pm_id, pm_name, em_id, em_name.
• getChangeRequestProgress — Tracks approval progress and determines what the signed-in user can do (approve/edit/cancel). Input: approval_steps, completed_steps, rejected_step, auto_approved, approver_id, approver_roles, requestor_id, request_status, responsible_id, pm_id, em_id.
• validateChangeRequest — Pre-submit validation: checks naming conflicts, duplicate targets, and constraint violations across all line items. Input: items (array of change items with would_violate), existing_categories (array with subcategories).
author: JAS
